testcase.name: test_aml_screen_customer

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520: Internal Server Error assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_banking_core_iteration_18.py:171: in test_aml_screen_customer assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520: Internal Server Error E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_kyc_aml_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: AML screening failed: Internal Server Error assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
